heading: Frameworks
body:
You can use the following open-source frameworks to store custom data
in your MongoDB clusters and implement features such as RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) with MongoDB Vector Search.

| Framework       | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | Documentation                                                          |
| --------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| LangChain       | Framework for building AI applications by using "chains," LangChain-specific components that can be combined together for various use cases. The LangChain MongoDB integration provides several components for RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation). | Integrate with LangChainIntegrate with LangChain JS/TS                 |
| LangChainGo     | Brings LangChain capabilities to the Go ecosystem.                                                                                                                                                                                                   | Integrate with LangChainGo                                             |
| LangChain4j     | Brings LangChain capabilities to Java.                                                                                                                                                                                                               | Integrate with LangChain4j                                             |
| LlamaIndex      | Framework that provides several tools for connecting custom data sources to LLM (Large Language Model)s and building RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) applications.                                                                              | Integrate with LlamaIndex                                              |
| Semantic Kernel | Framework from Microsoft that combines various AI services with your applications for use cases including RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation).                                                                                                      | Integrate with Semantic Kernel C#Integrate with Semantic Kernel Python |
| Haystack        | Python framework for building custom applications with LLM (Large Language Model)s, embedding models, vector search, and more for use cases such as RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation).                                                            | Integrate with Haystack                                                |
| Spring AI       | Applies Spring design principles to AI applications for use cases including RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation).                                                                                                                                    | Integrate with Spring AI                                               |
